base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of red_skeleton_regenerate — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Red Skeleton — 2-frame walk + 1 bone-pile collapse. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red Skeleton — 2-frame walk + 1 bone-pile collapse; regenerates. Mansion/Castlevania enemy
